stemHtml: An applicant for a CPL(A) must have completed at least how much cross-country flight time as PIC in aeroplanes?

options.a: 20 hours, including a cross-country flight of not less than 540 km (300 NM).
options.b: 25 hours, including a cross-country flight of not less than 540 km (300 NM).
options.c: 15 hours, including a cross-country flight of not less than 540 km (300 NM).
options.d: 10 hours, including a cross-country flight of not less than 540 km (300 NM).
